import sys
import json
import psycopg
import os

# Add the blueprint root to the python path so we can import supabase_config
sys.path.append("/Users/debashishdeb/Downloads/OMEIA-AI/farkki_ai_platform_blueprint")
from omeia.api.supabase_config import postgres_conn

def push_to_supabase():
 conn_uri = postgres_conn()
 print(f"Connecting to Postgres...")
 
 file_path = "/Users/debashishdeb/Downloads/OMEIA-AI/projects/4_CellCycle/cellcycle_extracted_knowledge.json"
 if not os.path.exists(file_path):
 print(f"Error: Could not find {file_path}")
 return
 
 with open(file_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
 data = json.load(f)
 
 doc_sources = data.get("document_sources", [])
 doc_chunks = data.get("document_chunks", [])
 
 try:
 with psycopg.connect(conn_uri) as conn:
 with conn.cursor() as cur:
 print(f"Inserting {len(doc_sources)} document sources...")
 # 1. Insert into rag.document_source
 for doc in doc_sources:
 cur.execute("""
 INSERT INTO rag.document_source (document_code, title, source_type, metadata)
 VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)
 ON CONFLICT (document_code) DO UPDATE
 SET title = EXCLUDED.title,
 source_type = EXCLUDED.source_type,
 metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata
 RETURNING document_id;
 """, (doc["document_code"], doc["title"], doc["source_type"], json.dumps(doc["metadata"])))
 doc_id = cur.fetchone()[0]
 doc["_db_id"] = doc_id

metadata
 RETURNING document_id;
 """, (doc["document_code"], doc["title"], doc["source_type"], json.dumps(doc["metadata"])))
 doc_id = cur.fetchone()[0]
 doc["_db_id"] = doc_id
 
 # Map document_code to generated document_id
 doc_id_map = {doc["document_code"]: doc["_db_id"] for doc in doc_sources}
 
 print(f"Inserting {len(doc_chunks)} document chunks...")
 # 2. Insert into rag.document_chunk
 for chunk in doc_chunks:
 doc_id = doc_id_map.get(chunk["document_code"])
 if not doc_id:
 continue
 # Based on schema, ON CONFLICT requires the unique constraint columns.
 # chunk_uid is UNIQUE.
 cur.execute("""
 INSERT INTO rag.document_chunk (document_id, chunk_index, chunk_uid, chunk_text, token_count, metadata)
 VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
 ON CONFLICT (chunk_uid) DO UPDATE
 SET chunk_text = EXCLUDED.chunk_text,
 token_count = EXCLUDED.token_count,
 metadata = EXCLUDED.metadata;
 """, (doc_id, chunk["chunk_index"], chunk["chunk_uid"], chunk["chunk_text"], chunk["token_count"], json.dumps(chunk["metadata"])))
 conn.commit()
 print(f"Successfully pushed {len(doc_sources)} documents and {len(doc_chunks)} chunks to Supabase/PostgreSQL.")
 except Exception as e:
 print(f"Error connecting to or inserting into database: {e}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
 push_to_supabase()
